checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 111 implements the next recommended task recorded after issue 109: pilot the plan-only issue-to-merge operator with a small safe dry-run before any GitHub-mutating operator mode.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: `issue-to-merge-plan` wrote `.specbridge/issue-to-merge-runs/issue-111-issue-to-merge-operator-pilot.issue-to-merge-run.json` and records plan-only mode, issue reference, evidence paths, phases, gates, merge conditions, memory closure, policy boundaries, and command boundary.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The pilot preserves the command boundary: no GitHub mutation from the operator, no runtime launch, no dependency installation, no CI/CD security change, no protected areas, and no deployment.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are limited to documentation, repository memory, contract, scope, issue-to-merge run, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit paths. No protected files or blocked areas were changed.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The required local standard validation, CLI tests, smoke validation, contract validation, scope validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate, review gate, and whitespace validation are recorded as passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The final report and audit packet mark CI as not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion pending PR CI, no deployment, and GitHub-mutating operator behavior as intentionally unimplemented future work.

findings.evidence: Issue 111 local pilot evidence is prepared, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
GitHub-mutating issue-to-merge operator behavior remains intentionally unimplemented and requires a future dedicated contract.
